policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. Per-file entries below are debt baselines (currently none — all source files clear the 90% floor). New files must hit 90% on first commit. Total floor tracks the package baseline measured on 2026-05-15. The gap between per-file floor (90%) and package floor (~74%) is `src/main.rs`, which is excluded from per-file checks because it's the CLI binary entry point (clap parsing, admin subcommand dispatch, QUIC listener spawn). Pure helpers extracted from main.rs live in `admin.rs` and are unit-tested at 99%+.
